# sizes

**Instance Property**

Access sample sizes.

## Declaration

```swift
var sizes: CMSampleBuffer.SizePerSample? { get set }
```

## Discussion

When setting distinct sizes, the number of entries must match [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/CMSampleBuffer/SamplePropertiesCollection/count].
title: sizes
